query:
SELECT 
  atoll,
  COUNT(*) as total_islands,
  SUM(CASE WHEN overview IS NOT NULL AND overview != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_overview,
  SUM(CASE WHEN heroImage IS NOT NULL AND heroImage != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_hero,
  SUM(CASE WHEN quickFacts IS NOT NULL AND quickFacts != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_facts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN topThingsToDo IS NOT NULL AND topThingsToDo != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_activities,
  SUM(CASE WHEN faq IS NOT NULL AND faq != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_faq,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN overview IS NOT NULL AND overview != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) as completeness_pct
FROM island_guides
GROUP BY atoll
ORDER BY completeness_pct DESC, atoll
